title: Continuous Batching & Speculative Decoding
content:
# Speculative Decoding

*   **Core Principle:** Draft model generates candidate tokens; target model validates them in a single batch forward pass.
*   **Acceptance Probability:** 
    
    $$\alpha = \min\left(1.0, \frac{P_{\text{target}}(x)}{P_{\text{draft}}(x)}\right)$$
